title: CG 1998
text: Home * Conferences * Computer and Games 1998 Next > The First International Conference on Computers and Games was held in Tsukuba , Japan , November 11-12, 1998 . Contents 1 Proceedings 2 Lectures 2.1 Search and Strategies 2.2 Learning and Pattern Acquisition 2.3 Theory 2.4 Go, Tsume-Shogi, and Heian-Shogi 3 Reports 4 External Links 5 References Proceedings [ edit ] Jaap van den Herik and Hiroyuki Iida (eds.)
